# logs

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: System logs pane, opened from the Debug sidebar.
- Exports (web):
  - Values: `logChannelPane`, `logsPane`
- Exports (server):
  - Types: `LogChannel`, `LogStream`
  - Values: `Log`
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` "logs"
  - `Pane.Register` "logs-channel"
  - `DebugApp.Sidebar` "Logs"
- Server:
  - `GET /api/logs/channels`
  - `WS /ws/logs`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
